name: Coffee At Carltons
address: 36 Toronto St, Toronto, ON M5C 2C5, Canada
description: Tucked on Toronto St in the Financial District. Small, no-fuss, and consistently good -- the kind of spot you end up at every single weekday.

name: Moments
address: 904 Dundas St W Main Floor, Toronto, ON M6J 1W1, Canada
description: A warm, intimate cafe in downtown Toronto with a loyal local following. Great for slowing down with a well-made coffee and a quiet corner.

name: 6x8 Market
address: 184 Baldwin St, Toronto, ON M5T 1L8, Canada
description: A tiny Kensington staple that punches above its square footage. Solid espresso, friendly faces, and a neighbourhood feel that's hard to fake.

name: Sip Sip
address: 101 Yorkville Ave, Toronto, ON M5R 1C1, Canada
description: Yorkville's low-key answer to the neighbourhood's usual fanfare. Good coffee, relaxed setting, and none of the pretension you'd expect.

name: Kandl Kafé
address: 88A Avenue Rd, Toronto, ON M5R 2H2, Canada
description: A cozy Annex cafe with a warm neighbourhood-living-room feel. Great for slow mornings and catching up over a good flat white.

name: SOLARIS COFFEE
address: 2A St Patrick St, Toronto, ON M5T 1T9, Canada
description: Sleek and specialty-focused, SOLARIS brings serious coffee credentials to the downtown core without making it feel like a lecture.

name: Black wolf coffee
address: 717 Bay St., Toronto, ON M5G 2J9, Canada
description: A no-nonsense downtown spot serving well-made espresso drinks to a crowd that knows what they want. Quick service, consistent quality.

name: Ivy. Coffee Shop
address: 109 Queens Quay W, Toronto, ON M5J 2T5, Canada
description: Light-filled and inviting, Ivy is one of those downtown spots that feels like a relief. Good coffee, good energy, easy to like.

name: Hailed Coffee - Elizabeth St.
address: 112 Elizabeth St Unit 2, Toronto, ON M5G 1P5, Canada
description: Compact and consistent on Elizabeth St. Hailed keeps things simple with well-pulled shots and a crowd that keeps coming back for more.

name: Mystik Cafe
address: 56C Kensington Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2K1, Canada
description: Kensington's most eclectic cafe, where the coffee is solid and the vibe is something you have to experience. Reliably weird in the best way.

name: EPOS Cafe & Restaurant
address: 90 Yorkville Ave, Toronto, ON M5R 1B9, Canada
description: A Yorkville all-day spot that handles breakfast and lunch as well as it handles coffee. Comfortable, consistent, and a bit of a hidden gem.

name: Daily Dose Coffee Bar
address: 125 John St, Toronto, ON M5V 2E2, Canada
description: Quick, reliable, and well-located downtown. Daily Dose does exactly what the name promises -- a solid cup to get your morning going right.

name: Fahrenheit Coffee
address: 120 Lombard St, Toronto, ON M5C 3H5, Canada
description: Precise about its coffee and it shows. Fahrenheit brings a specialty edge to the downtown core with a clean, focused menu.

name: Goldstruck Coffee
address: 133 Richmond St W #103, Toronto, ON M5H 3S5, Canada
description: Bright and well-designed, Goldstruck is the kind of cafe that makes you want to stay longer than planned. Great espresso to match the space.

name: El Pacho Coffee Roasters
address: 40 University Ave Unit 8, Toronto, ON M5J 1T1, Canada
description: King West's go-to for specialty coffee with Colombian roots. The beans are sourced with care and the results are consistently impressive.

name: Library Coffee
address: 917 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1G5, Canada
description: Low-key and bookish in the best way. Library Coffee is a solid spot for working, reading, or just disappearing for a quiet hour.

name: Augusta Coffee Bar
address: 229 Augusta Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2L4, Canada
description: Right on Augusta in Kensington, this is the kind of neighbourhood bar regulars guard like a secret. Simple, good, and completely unpretentious.

name: The Harmony Cafe/Bar
address: 75 Nassau St, Toronto, ON M5T 1M6, Canada
description: Half cafe, half bar, all Kensington. Harmony has an easy-going energy and a patio that makes summer mornings here genuinely great.

name: San Cafe
address: 165 Augusta Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2L4, Canada
description: A Kensington cafe that wears its neighbourhood identity well. Relaxed, colourful, and a nice spot to watch the market come alive.

name: Nonni Cafe & Bakery
address: 430 King St W Unit 4, Toronto, ON M5V 1K3, Canada
description: Queen West's favourite Italian-leaning cafe. The pastries are the real draw but the coffee holds its own. Expect a line on weekends.

name: Hello Coffee
address: 800 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6G 1L9, Canada
description: A cheerful downtown spot with an approachable menu and a name that pretty much says it all. Good for a quick stop or a longer stay.

name: Library Coffee
address: 281 Dundas St W, Toronto, ON M5T 1G1, Canada
description: Low-key and bookish in the best way. Library Coffee is a solid spot for working, reading, or just disappearing for a quiet hour.

name: Nabulu Coffee
address: 6 St Joseph St, Toronto, ON M4Y 1J7, Canada
description: A downtown spot doing things a little differently. Nabulu has real character and takes its coffee seriously without being precious about it.

name: Lazy Barista
address: 157 Queens Quay E, Toronto, ON M5A 1B4, Canada
description: The name is ironic -- the coffee here is anything but lazy. A downtown favourite for those who know where to find a proper espresso.

name: Hale Coffee Company
address: 1 Adelaide St E, Toronto, ON M5C 1J4, Canada
description: One of downtown Toronto's most dependable coffee stops. Hale is consistent, unpretentious, and the kind of place you always end up walking into.

name: Graination Specialty Coffee
address: 204 Spadina Ave. Ground floor, Toronto, ON M5T 2C2, Canada
description: Serious about specialty but approachable about it. Graination is a downtown gem for anyone who wants great coffee without the attitude.

name: FIKA Cafe
address: 28 Kensington Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2J9, Canada
description: Named after the Swedish tradition of a proper coffee break. Fika in Kensington is exactly that -- a good excuse to slow down and stay awhile.

name: Moonbean Coffee Company
address: 30 St Andrew St, Toronto, ON M5T 1K6, Canada
description: A Kensington institution. Moonbean has been doing its thing for decades, and the coffee and community are both as strong as ever.

name: Butter & Blue
address: 7 Baldwin St, Toronto, ON M5T 1L1, Canada
description: A Kensington spot that balances a great coffee program with baked goods worth coming back for. The croissants are the right level of flaky.

name: Wu Wei Coffee | 无为
address: 44 Kensington Ave Lower Unit, Toronto, ON M5T 2J9, Canada
description: A serene Kensington cafe inspired by the Taoist concept of effortless action. The coffee is deliberate, the atmosphere is genuinely calm.

name: Aeset Coffee Co.
address: 24 Bellair St Suite 6, Toronto, ON M5R 2C7, Canada
description: A quiet Annex gem that puts real care into its coffee. Small, focused, and the kind of place that makes the neighbourhood better for being there.

name: Rooms Coffee
address: 135 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Z6, Canada
description: One of Ossington's most beautiful spaces. The interior at Rooms is genuinely stunning and the coffee is good enough to hold up to it.

reviews.author: Jess F.
reviews.text: This place is stunning. The interior design alone is worth visiting for — and the coffee matches the aesthetic. My cortado was perfect.

reviews.author: Andrew C.
reviews.text: Instantly became my favourite cafe in the city. Ossington has so many good spots but Rooms stands out. Go for the flat white and stay for the atmosphere.

name: Rooms | 17 Baldwin
address: 17 Baldwin St, Toronto, ON M5T 1L1, Canada
description: The Baldwin St location of Rooms brings the same considered aesthetic to Kensington. A thoughtful space for a slow, deliberate coffee.

name: Mercury Espresso
address: 465 King St E Unit #5, Toronto, ON M5A 1L6, Canada
description: A downtown classic that has stayed relevant by staying consistent. Mercury makes great espresso and has the loyal regulars to prove it.

name: Varda
address: 350 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 3X2, Canada
description: A King West cafe with a strong design sensibility and a coffee program that keeps pace. Come for the space, return for the flat white.

name: Versus Coffee
address: 70 Adelaide St E, Toronto, ON M5C 2R6, Canada
description: A downtown specialty spot that takes a considered approach to everything on the menu. The pour-overs here are worth the wait.

name: HotBlack Coffee
address: 245 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1Z4, Canada
description: One of the best-known specialty cafes in Toronto and the reputation is earned. HotBlack is a downtown coffee institution worth visiting.

name: Mast Coffee
address: 68 Shuter St, Toronto, ON M5B 1Y4, Canada
description: A calm, focused downtown cafe that does a small menu of things really well. The kind of place you feel genuinely good about choosing.

name: Vereda Central Coffee Roasters
address: 14 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M5H 3R3, Canada
description: Colombian-owned and roaster-led, Vereda Central brings warmth and coffee expertise downtown. The single origins are the move here.

name: NEO COFFEE BAR
address: 161 Frederick St Unit 100, Toronto, ON M5A 1J9, Canada
description: A downtown Toronto staple with multiple locations and consistently high standards. NEO is what good specialty coffee at scale looks like.

name: Carbonic Coffee (Baldwin)
address: 37 Baldwin St, Toronto, ON M5T 1L1, Canada
description: A technically precise cafe on Baldwin using carbonic maceration for a fruity, wine-like cup. Worth a visit if you're curious about process.

name: Shy Coffee Co.
address: 766 King St W #3, Toronto, ON M5V 1N6, Canada
description: Quiet in name, not in quality. Shy Coffee on Queen West makes a strong case for itself with a focused menu and well-sourced beans.

name: Cafe23
address: 728 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1E8, Canada
description: A Queen West neighbourhood cafe that has built its following the old-fashioned way -- by being consistently good and genuinely welcoming.

name: Goldstruck Coffee
address: 130 Cumberland St, Toronto, ON M5R 1A6, Canada
description: Bright and well-designed, Goldstruck is the kind of cafe that makes you want to stay longer than planned. Great espresso to match the space.

name: Jacked Up Coffee
address: 55 Avenue Rd, Toronto, ON L1N 4H4, Canada
description: An Annex staple with serious coffee credentials and a laid-back atmosphere that makes it hard to leave. Regulars are very regular here.

name: Arvo Coffee
address: 17 Gristmill Lane, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: Australian-influenced and Distillery District-located. Arvo makes excellent flat whites and has one of the better patios in the area.

name: Jimmy's Coffee
address: 15 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Y8, Canada
description: A true Ossington original. Jimmy's has a loyal following for good reason -- the coffee is excellent and the place feels genuinely alive.

reviews.author: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Best espresso on Ossington, hands down. Tiny spot but the vibe is perfect — always feels like a neighbourhood secret. Staff remember your order after two visits.

reviews.author: Daniel K.
reviews.text: The pour-over here is exceptional. I've tried a lot of specialty coffee in Toronto and Jimmy's is consistently top tier. Great for working on a laptop too.

name: Coffee Oysters Champagne
address: 214 King St W Basement Level 1, Toronto, ON M5H 3S6, Canada
description: King West's most unexpected combo. The name delivers on its promise and so does the coffee. A neighbourhood spot with a lot of personality.

name: Arvo Coffee & Wine
address: 80 Atlantic Ave, Toronto, ON M6K 1X9, Canada
description: The Queen West version of Arvo brings Australian coffee culture to one of Toronto's best streets. Great for mornings and after five.

name: Coffee Exchange
address: 109 McCaul St #34, Toronto, ON M5T 3K5, Canada
description: A Kensington institution that has anchored the corner for years. The Exchange is where the market gets its morning started.

name: Coco Espresso Bar
address: 29 Bellair St, Toronto, ON M5R 1B8, Canada
description: A warm, polished Annex spot with strong espresso and a comfortable space. Coco is the kind of cafe that makes the neighbourhood better.

name: Coffee Lunar
address: 920 Yonge St #6, Toronto, ON M4W 3C7, Canada
description: A Yorkville cafe with a cool design-forward interior and a specialty coffee program that holds up. Worth the slightly elevated price point.

name: Forget Me Not Coffee
address: 102 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Z4, Canada
description: A charming spot with a name that sticks for good reason. The lattes are beautiful, the space is small, and it fills up fast on weekends.

name: Balzac's Distillery District
address: 1 Trinity St, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: A Toronto classic in a landmark location. Balzac's in the Distillery District is a must-visit, especially when the cobblestone patio opens up.

name: Dineen Coffee Co.
address: 140 Yonge St, Toronto, ON M5C 1X6, Canada
description: Set inside a beautiful historic building downtown, Dineen is one of Toronto's most atmospheric cafes. The space is gorgeous, the coffee earns its place.

name: White Squirrel Coffee Shop
address: 907 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1G5, Canada
description: An underrated Queen West gem that earns its regulars through quiet consistency. Good wifi, good coffee, and a calm space to actually think.

reviews.author: Chloe B.
reviews.text: Hidden gem on Queen West. Never too busy, fast wifi, and the oat milk latte is incredible. My go-to spot for writing sessions.

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Underrated spot. The staff are friendly, it's quieter than most cafes on this strip, and the coffee is really well done. Highly recommend for anyone who needs to get work done.

name: The Coffee
address: 150 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M5S 1M4, Canada
description: A straightforward name for a straightforward Annex cafe that does the basics very well. No gimmicks, just good coffee in a good space.

name: WFM Coffee Bar
address: 87 Avenue Rd, Toronto, ON M5R 3R9, Canada
description: The Annex's most unpretentious coffee stop. WFM is quick, friendly, and makes a solid espresso drink without any ceremony.

name: 5 Elements Espresso Bar
address: 131 Avenue Rd, Toronto, ON M5R 2H7, Canada
description: A focused Annex spot with a tasting-menu approach to espresso. 5 Elements is for the genuinely curious coffee drinker in Toronto.

name: Pilot Coffee Roasters
address: 117 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Z2, Canada
description: One of Toronto's best roasters with a flagship on Ossington that lives up to the reputation. Come for the pour-over, stay for the beans.

name: I DEAL COFFEE & WINE
address: 162 Ossington Ave, Toronto, ON M6J 2Z7, Canada
description: Coffee and wine done right on Ossington. I DEAL handles both with equal care and zero fussiness. One of the strip's best kept secrets.

name: Daily Ritual Cafe
address: 1 King St W, Toronto, ON M5H 1A1, Canada
description: A downtown cafe that takes the word ritual seriously. Consistent, well-made coffee in a calm setting that makes the morning feel worthwhile.

name: FILM CAFE
address: 230 Augusta Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2L6, Canada
description: A Kensington cafe for film lovers and those who wish they were. The programming is fun and the coffee is good enough to sit through it.

name: LADURÉE Toronto - Yorkville Café
address: 162 Cumberland St, Toronto, ON M5R 3N5, Canada
description: The Toronto home of the legendary Parisian patisserie. Laduree in Yorkville is as beautiful as you'd expect and worth every dollar.

name: Cafe X Bica
address: 160 Pears Ave. Unit 100, Toronto, ON M5R 1S9, Canada
description: A downtown cafe with Portuguese roots and a strong espresso tradition. Cafe X Bica is a neighbourhood spot with real character.

name: ZAZA Espresso Bar
address: 162 Cumberland St, Toronto, ON M5R 3N5, Canada
description: A Yorkville espresso bar that punches above its size. ZAZA is compact, quick, and makes a notably good cortado.

name: Amadeus Patisserie
address: 1235 Bay St., Toronto, ON M5R 3K4, Canada
description: An Annex patisserie where the coffee holds its own against the pastries. The baked goods are the real story but the espresso keeps up.

name: A-OK CAFE
address: 50 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M4W 3L8, Canada
description: A no-nonsense Annex cafe that gets it right every time. A-OK lives up to its name -- solid coffee, friendly service, and good vibes.

name: Fungo Cafe
address: 800 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1N6, Canada
description: A King West spot inspired by Japanese kissaten culture. Fungo is calm, considered, and serves some of the most interesting coffee on the strip.

name: The Theatre Centre Café/Bar
address: 1115 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1J1, Canada
description: The cafe inside the Theatre Centre on Queen West. A creative crowd, good coffee, and a space that feels genuinely different from everything around it.

name: Louie Coffee Shop
address: 1187 King St W, Toronto, ON M6K 3C5, Canada
description: Liberty Village's neighbourhood living room. Louie is friendly, reliable, and the kind of spot locals are glad exists on their block.

name: TonTon Matcha + Coffee
address: 100 Western Battery Rd #1, Toronto, ON M6K 3S2, Canada
description: Liberty Village's dedicated matcha spot. TonTon takes the green stuff seriously with a focused menu and quality that shows in every cup.

name: Thindi Cafe
address: 153 E Liberty St, Toronto, ON M6K 3G3, Canada
description: A Liberty Village cafe with South Asian-inspired flavours and a warm, welcoming space. Something genuinely different from the usual coffee shop formula.

name: Balzac's Liberty Village
address: 43 Hanna Ave #123, Toronto, ON M6K 1X1, Canada
description: The Liberty Village outpost of Toronto's beloved roaster. Balzac's brings its signature warmth and excellent coffee to the neighbourhood.

name: Liberty Village Market & Cafe
address: 65 Jefferson Ave, Toronto, ON M6K 1X8, Canada
description: A neighbourhood staple in Liberty Village with a market feel and a loyal local crowd. Good for a quick coffee or a slower morning.

name: Highly Likely Coffee
address: 1189 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6J 1J4, Canada
description: Liberty Village's most optimistic cafe. Highly Likely earns its name with consistently good coffee and a space that's easy to spend time in.

name: Aroma Espresso Bar
address: 120 Lynn Williams St #101, Toronto, ON M6K 3N6, Canada
description: A Liberty Village classic with a broad menu and a comfortable, lived-in atmosphere. Aroma is reliable, familiar, and always busy for good reason.

name: Bold Brew Coffee
address: 219 Dufferin St #105B, Toronto, ON M6K 3J1, Canada
description: Liberty Village's specialty-leaning option. Bold Brew lives up to its name with strong sourcing and a menu that rewards the curious coffee drinker.

name: The Common
address: 36 Lisgar St, Toronto, ON M6J 0A9, Canada
description: A Liberty Village cafe that functions as a genuine neighbourhood gathering spot. Relaxed, friendly, and good at the things that matter most.

name: Larry's Place
address: 1390 Queen St W, Toronto, ON M6K 1L7, Canada
description: A Liberty Village spot with a personal feel and a loyal local following. Larry's is the kind of cafe that makes a neighbourhood feel like a community.

name: Found Coffee | Bellwoods
address: 189 Shaw St, Toronto, ON M6J 2W7, Canada
description: A Bellwoods-adjacent spot worth seeking out. Found Coffee is exactly that -- a good thing to stumble across, and even better to return to.

name: Milky's Cloud Room
address: 28 Bathurst St #1107, Toronto, ON M5V 0R4, Canada
description: A dreamy Liberty Village cafe that takes its aesthetic as seriously as its coffee. Milky's is a genuinely fun place to spend an afternoon.

name: The Abbott
address: 99 Spencer Ave, Toronto, ON M6K 1G6, Canada
description: A solid Liberty Village option with a clean, modern feel and a coffee program that keeps the neighbourhood well-caffeinated. Dependable and good.

name: Project Seoul
address: 355 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5T 2G3, Canada
description: A Chinatown cafe with Korean-inspired touches and a thoughtful approach to both coffee and the space itself. Worth a detour.

name: NEO COFFEE BAR KING X SPADINA
address: 61 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5V 1K1, Canada
description: The King x Spadina outpost of Toronto's favourite specialty bar. NEO delivers the same high standards in a great corner location.

name: Cafe La_On
address: 453 Dundas St W Main Floor, Toronto, ON M5T 1G8, Canada
description: A cozy Chinatown spot with a relaxed atmosphere and solid coffee. Cafe La_On is a good find in a neighbourhood full of things competing for your attention.

name: Dark Horse Espresso Bar
address: 215 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5T 2C7, Canada
description: A Toronto institution with real staying power. Dark Horse in Chinatown is a reliable, atmospheric spot that earns its reputation every single day.

name: 10 DEAN | Waverley
address: The Lobby Of The Waverley, Apartment Bldg, 484 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5S 0E4, Canada
description: A Chinatown gem at the corner of Dean and Waverley. Small, focused, and one of those spots that feels like a genuine neighbourhood discovery.

name: Cosmo Cafe | Bar
address: 398 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5T 2G5, Canada
description: A Chinatown cafe and bar that transitions smoothly throughout the day. Cosmo is a comfortable spot for a coffee, a meal, or something stronger.

name: HANBINGO 한빙고
address: 397 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5T 2G6, Canada
description: A Chinatown spot specialising in Korean shaved ice and quality drinks. HANBINGO is a fun, colourful destination that does something genuinely unique.

name: De Mello Coffee
address: 8 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5V 0S8, Canada
description: A downtown institution known for its serious approach to sourcing and roasting. De Mello is where Toronto's coffee culture has long had a home.

name: ICHA TEA
address: 235 Spadina Ave. Unit 4, Toronto, ON M5T 2E2, Canada
description: A Chinatown tea and coffee shop that takes both seriously. ICHA TEA is a calm, considered space for anyone who wants something beyond the usual.

name: Lait Night
address: 81 Huron St Main Floor, Toronto, ON M5T 2A8, Canada
description: A late-night Chinatown option that fills a real gap in the neighbourhood. Lait Night is where you go when everywhere else has already closed.

name: Le Gourmand
address: 152 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5V 3S6, Canada
description: A downtown spot with a European sensibility and a menu that goes well beyond coffee. Le Gourmand is worth a visit for the pastries alone.

name: LITTLE PEBBLES CAFE
address: 160 Baldwin St #8, Toronto, ON M5T 3K7, Canada
description: A small Kensington cafe with a big personality. Little Pebbles is the kind of spot you feel lucky to find and happy to keep coming back to.

name: Crimson Teas
address: 415 Spadina Ave., Toronto, ON M5T 2G6, Canada
description: A Chinatown tea house that approaches its craft with real care. Crimson Teas is a calm alternative to the neighbourhood's busier coffee spots.

name: Arena Coffee Bar
address: 15 Tank House Lane, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: A Distillery District cafe with an industrial edge and a strong coffee program. Arena is a solid spot before or after exploring the historic district.

name: Brick Street Bakery
address: 27 Trinity St, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: A Distillery District institution famous for its breads and pastries. The coffee is good but it's the baked goods that make this a must-visit.

name: Berkeley Cafe
address: 262 The Esplanade, Toronto, ON M5A 4J6, Canada
description: A downtown spot with a comfortable, unpretentious atmosphere and consistently good coffee. Berkeley is a reliable choice in a neighbourhood of options.

name: Wildly Delicious Fine Foods
address: 11 Tank House Lane, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: A Distillery District spot that lives up to its name. Wildly Delicious pairs quality coffee with exceptional food in a beautiful historic setting.

name: Roozamoon Cafe
address: 398 Queen St E, Toronto, ON M5A 1T3, Canada
description: A downtown cafe with Persian-inspired touches and a warm, inviting atmosphere. Roozamoon is a distinctive spot that stands out from the usual options.

name: El Catrin Destileria
address: 18 Tank House Lane, Toronto, ON M5A 3C4, Canada
description: A Distillery District spot with Mexican flair and a beautiful space to match. El Catrin is a great stop for coffee before dinner or drinks after.

name: Wallace Espresso
address: 848 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1P1, Canada
description: A King West coffee bar that keeps things focused and does it well. Wallace is for people who want a great espresso without any distraction.

name: Café Negin
address: 787 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1N4, Canada
description: A King West cafe with a warm, personal feel and a loyal neighbourhood following. Cafe Negin is a reminder of what a good local spot should be.

name: Jacked Up Coffee 225 King
address: 225 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 3M2, Canada
description: The King St location of Jacked Up Coffee, bringing the same Annex-loved coffee program to King West. Consistent, well-made, and easy to like.

name: Forno Cultura
address: 609 King St W, Toronto, ON M5V 1M5, Canada
description: One of Toronto's best bakeries, with a coffee program that holds its own against the pastries. Forno Cultura on King West is worth the inevitable wait.

name: maman
address: 100 King St W, Toronto, ON M5X 1A9, Canada
description: The Toronto outpost of the beloved New York cafe. maman on King West is beautiful, the coffee is excellent, and the cookies are worth making a trip for.

name: NEO COFFEE BAR PATH
address: The Exchange Tower, 130 King St W CS12A, Toronto, ON M5X 1E1, Canada
description: NEO in the PATH brings specialty coffee underground. A genuinely good option for downtown workers who want quality without going outside.

name: Sam James Coffee Bar - PATH
address: 150 King St W, Toronto, ON M5H 3T9, Canada
description: Sam James underground in the PATH. The same focused, quality-driven approach that made the original famous, now available for the downtown commute.

name: Cosette Coffee
address: 1715 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6P 1B2, Canada
description: A downtown cafe with a soft, feminine aesthetic and a serious coffee program underneath it. Cosette is pretty and substantive in equal measure.

name: The Brick Room (一期一会)
address: 9 Temperance St, Toronto, ON M5H 1Y6, Canada
description: A beautiful, minimalist Japanese-inspired cafe in downtown Toronto. The matcha and espresso are both excellent and the space is genuinely calming.

name: Ninetails Coffee | Bloor
address: 651 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6G 1L1, Canada
description: A Bloor St cafe with an anime-inspired name and a coffee program that takes things seriously. Ninetails is a fun, well-made addition to the Annex.

name: Typist Studios & Coffee
address: 390 Dupont St, Toronto, ON M5R 1V9, Canada
description: A creative studio and coffee bar in the Annex. Typist is a thoughtful space for working, meeting, or just enjoying a well-made espresso.

name: Pamenar
address: 307 Augusta Ave, Toronto, ON M5T 2M2, Canada
description: A Kensington Market cafe and bar with an eclectic, slightly chaotic energy that fits the neighbourhood perfectly. Great coffee, great vibe, no pretension.

name: Woolshed Coffee
address: 850b Adelaide St W, Toronto, ON M6J 2S1, Canada
description: An Australian-inspired King West cafe that brings a laid-back energy to one of Toronto's busiest strips. The flat whites are very much the move.
